Adliance.Togglr 1.3.5+f39500ac4cdb404e1a5f1cf73fa94b41806dc661
Adliance GmbH

  -w, --workspace           Required. The Toggl workspace.

  -k, --apikey              Required. The Toggl API key.

  -p, --project             Required. The Toggl project ID.

  -f, --from                The lower boundary of the time range. Defaults to
                            first day of last month.

  -t, --to                  The upper boundary of the time range. Defaults to
                            last day of last month.

  -o, --output              (Default: ./project-time-report.md) The output path.

  -m, --max-poolsize        (Optional) The maximum hours pool size for the
                            specified project.

  -c, --current-poolsize    (Optional) The currently remaining hours pool size
                            for the specified project. Leave empty to calculate
                            automatically.

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.
